jobs.name: norwegian-job-finder-michael
jobs.description: Weekday job scan for Michael — AI leadership roles in Norway
jobs.prompt:
IMPORTANT: All exec commands are pre-approved. Run scripts directly.

Run the norwegian-job-finder skill. Read skills/norwegian-job-finder/SKILL.md and follow the workflow.

Step 1: Run python3 skills/norwegian-job-finder/scripts/scan_jobs.py --config michael-ai-leadership.json
Step 2: Score and filter the JSON results.
Step 3: Format the output.
Step 4: Update dedup memory.
